sections_added: 5.4 Scale Considerations (Informational — Not In-Scope for E3)
refinement_summary: Research had no annotations to remove (SD was already clean); elevated 6 research gotchas into first-class content: added Signal File Format (JSON payload + ts field), Atomic Signal Writes (os.rename pattern with fsync), and a full Implementation Notes section covering atomicity, stale-signal prevention, timeout propagation, scale/watchdog deferral, and out-of-scope cross-epic concerns.
remaining_concerns: The write_signal() atomic pattern assumes source and destination are on the same filesystem; if signals_dir is on a different mount than the tmp location this will fail. A note or os.path check may be warranted.
Epic 2 git-log polling fragility was noted as a gotcha but is deliberately deferred — the SD cross-references it under section 5.5.
